nasb.text: So she increased her harlotries. And she saw men portrayed on the wall, images of the Chaldeans portrayed with vermilion,

esv.text: But she carried her whoring further. She saw men portrayed on the wall, the images of the Chaldeans portrayed in vermilion,

cnv.text: 阿荷利巴又繼續行淫；她看見畫在牆上的人像，就是用鮮紅的顏料所畫的迦勒底人像，

ccb.text: 她还变本加厉地放荡淫乱，看见墙上用朱砂画着迦勒底人的像，
